madeira-style-swordfish-teleculinaria.name: Madeira-style Swordfish

ingredients.item: Batatas cozidas com pele e meias-luas de tomate para acompanhar

instructions: Season the swordfish posts with salt, pepper and lemon juice. Pass them through flour and fry them in hot oil.
Peel and cut the bananas in half, in the direction of length. Put them on a tray, sprinkle them with sugar and put them in the oven, preheated to 180oC, until they caramelize.
Sirva o peixe frito com a banana caramelizada por cima, acompanhando com batatas cozidas com pele e meias-luas de tomate.

make-a-delicious-lobster-newberg-step-by.original_name: Haz paso a paso una deliciosa langosta newberg
instructions: Cooking the locusts with his head down in boiling water with salt for 15 minutes. He then removes his meat from his tails and claws and cuts them into medium pieces and reserves them.
In a large frying pan, melt butter with medium heat. Add lobster and paddle for 3 minutes.
It incorporates the brandy and flares the mixture. Add cream (milk cream), egg yolks, nutmeg, salt and pepper. It cooks with low heat, stirring constantly, till the salsa thick.
Add cream (milk cream), egg yolks, nutmeg, salt and pepper. It cooks with low heat, stirring constantly, till the salsa thick.

Sirve la langosta caliente.

malasada-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Malasada Recipe
instructions: Dissolve yeast in milk. Wipe the flour into a bowl and, in the center, pour the milk with yeast, lemon zest, sugar, butter, lard, a pinch of salt and brandy.
Knead very well, adding the eggs one by one. If necessary, add some milk. Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it leave about 30 minutes in a warm place.
After the specified time, remove pieces of dough and work them in circular shape, making the dough thinner in the middle.
Take to fry in very hot oil, pour on absorbent paper and pass through a mixture of sugar and cinnamon powder.

mango-sorbet.name: Mango Sorbet
instructions: Place cubed mango into a food processor; blend until smooth. Pour in simple syrup and lime juice to taste; process until smooth.
Transfer mango mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to manufacturer’s instructions, about 20 minutes.

marmalade-poncik-lezzet.name: Marmalade Poncho
instructions: 1. Add and blend flour dough into kneading container.
2. Add the instant yeast and blend again.
3. Sugar, warm milk, eggs and eggs in room heat.
4. After kneading for 5 minutes, add softened butter and grated lemon peel in room heat and continue kneading.
5. In the room temperature of the dough u with moist cloth cover in a way of 50 minutes.
6. The dough of the dough is divided into two equal parts.
7. Remove the light bench gang. 25 cm diameter of open and divided into 8 equal parts.
8. Triangular partdd to the middle of the beer and wrap in the form of rolls starting from long edges.
9. Prepare the remaining t&uuml material in this way.

11. 11. Set the oven to 200 degrees and heat it for 10 minutes.
12. Cookware in the oven for 20 minutes.

marsala-poached-pears.name: Marsala-poached Pears
instructions: Cut pears in half lengthwise and remove cores; set aside.
Add Marsala cooking wine, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg to a small bowl; stir to dissolve sugar. Set aside.

Melt butter in a large 12-inch skillet. Stir in Marsala mixture. Cook over medium heat until bubbly. Place pears cut-side down in the skillet. Cover and cook over medium-low heat until a paring knife easily slides into flesh, about 20 minutes. Remove from heat and let stand until cool enough to serve, 30 to 45 minutes.
Place each pear half in a small bowl. Stir remaining sauce in the skillet; drizzle each serving with 1 to 2 teaspoons warm sauce. Top each with a small scoop of ice cream and toasted pecans.

marzipan-cheesecake-recipe-comedera.name: Marzipan Cheesecake Recipe
instructions: Start with your recipe and place the tidddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd@@
Now pour the crushed cookies into a bowl and also melt butter with peanut cream.
Mezcla estos tres ingredientes hasta que queden bien unido y crees una pasta.
Lleva esta mezcla a un molde y presiona hasta formar la base. Deja reposar en el refrigerador.
In a small bowl, hydrate the granetin with water for 5 minutes, and then take it to the microwave for 15 seconds to melt.
Ahora, agrega la licuadora el queso crema, la media crema, la leche y la grenetina fundida.
Also, add sugar, vanilla and pits. He's good at his best till all his ingredients come together and create a cream.
Saca el molde del refrigerador y vierte toda la mezcla del cheesecake.
Procede y leva al refrigerador hasta que cuaje, durante 4 a 6 horas.
After that time, get him out of the refrigerator and decorate with his chocolate syrup and his peanuts.
Corta en porciones y disfruta.

mashed-sweet-potatoes-argiro.name: Mashed Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Wash the sweet potatoes very well with their peel so that every soil residue is removed.
Place them in a pot with plenty of cold water and boil for about 40 minutes until soft.
We drill with a fork; If they are soft, remove them from the fire and immediately remove them from the water.
Allow them to cool and, while still warm, peel them or open them in half and remove the crumb with a spoon.
If they are boiled, because they may have sucked moisture, put the crumb in a colander for a few minutes.
Remove any fibers between the skin and the flesh.
Transfer the flush into a bowl and melt it with a bowl of chewed potatoes or stringing wire while warm — the chewed potatoes become smootheven with a fork.
In an anti-stick pot, on high heat, we wash the bacon without adding a fatty substance for about 2 minutes.
Lower the heat (in moderate intensity), add the cream or milk and boil for 2 minutes.
Add the butter to the cream in pieces to melt quickly, then add the melted sweet potato mashed mashed potatoes.
Salt pepper and mix with a wooden spoon until the puree is homogenized and has a velvety texture.
Perfume with some fresh thyme or nutmeg.
If we are to serve it later, cover the surface with a membrane tangent to the mashed potatoes, so that it remains smooth.
Serve the chewed hot — ideal for pork, grilled turkey, boat or duck.

meat-caterpillar-teleculinaria.name: Meat Caterpillar
instructions: Cut the meat into pieces, put half into the robot cup, turn on 1 minute, progressively until it reaches maximum speed, remove and lay in a bowl. Repeat the previous operation with the remaining meat and add to the bowl.

Peel and wash the onion and garlic teeth, cut the onion into rooms, lay everything in the cup, turn 5 seconds at speed 5 (6 seconds and speed 6 on Mycook) and add to the bowl. Add some chopped parsley and egg, season with salt and mix well. Then mold small burgers sprinkle with grated bread and lead them to grill or fry on both sides.

Wash the tomato and cherry tomato and cut the tomato into buds. Have the burgers on the skewer alternating with the tomato buds and place the cherry tomato on the end to make the ''Lagarita''. Serve tastefully decorated and accompany with spaghetti or French fries.

meat-feast-teleculinaria.name: Meat Feast

ingredients.item: 1 saqueta de fermento seco de padeiro

instructions: Lay the yeast in the robot cup, add the eggs, flour, olive oil, soft butter and a pinch of salt and call for 5 minutes at the special speed for pasta, passing the spatula in half. Remove the dough from the glass, wrap it in a sprinkle of flour, put it in a large bowl also sprinkled with flour, cut it in cross, cover it with a damp cloth and let it leave to double the volume.

The filling: remove the skin from the sausages and sausage, cut the sausages into pieces in the direction of the length and the sausage in the slices. Discard the rind and fat to the ham and cut it into pieces. Remove the dough from the bowl, knead it a little on the counter, then extend it until you get a rectangle, spread a few of the meats over a margin of the dough, fold, spread the rest of the meats and double the dough back to cover. Have it on an oven tray sprinkled with flour, cover with a cloth and leave another 30 minutes.

Mix the yolk with the milk, brush over it and bring it to the oven preheated to 180.3. for about 35 minutes or until it is well cooked and golden. Stick a toothpick to check, remove it from the oven, let it love and then serve decorated to taste.

meat-tortilla-teleculinaria.name: Meat Tortilla
instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes into cubes. Heat a deep frying pan (about 22 to 24 cm in diameter) with abundant olive oil, add the potatoes and let them fry until they are slightly golden. Remove for a platter with absorbent paper and sprinkle with salt.
Numa tigela grande, bata os ovos, junte as batatas fritas e misture tudo. Reserve.

Escorra o azeite da frigideira, deixando apenas um pouco, e leve novamente ao lume. Junte as cebolas, descascadas e cortadas em meias-luas, e deixe refogar muito bem. Acrescente a carne, tempere com sal e deixe cozinhar muito bem, mexendo.

Reduce the heat to medium, add to the skillet the mixture of eggs and potatoes and let it cook slowly. When the eggs are solidified, put a plate over and turn the tortilla to cook on the other side. Serve with salad.

meatball-casserole.name: Meatball Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Stir rotini, marinara sauce, water, pizza sauce, and milk together in a bowl. Pour into a deep baking dish; pasta should be completely submerged in sauce. Cover dish tightly with foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes; uncover and arrange meatballs on top, pushing them partially into pasta and sauce; cover tightly with foil.
Bake until pasta is tender yet firm to the bite, 20 to 30 minutes more.
Uncover; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese; return to oven for 5 minutes. Remove and let cool 5 minutes before serving.

mediterranean-salad-with-feta-cheese-lez.name: Mediterranean Salad With Feta Cheese
instructions: 1. Taste your iftar tables with salad recipes of flavor.
2. Wash the Mediterranean greens with plenty of water and drain.
3. slice the cheese in the form of coarse cubes, and sprinkle the pot.
4. Take greens in the form of large bowls.
5. Place the cube cut white cheeses and cherry tomatoes on it.
6. 3 tablespoons of olive oil and mix the juice of half a lemon in a bowl.
7. Pour on the salad by walking.
8. Serve.

mediterranean-style-eggplant-pasta.name: Mediterranean-style Eggplant Pasta
instructions: Arrange eggplant slices in a colander and sprinkle with enough salt to lightly coat; drain for about 10 minutes. Rinse eggplant and pat dry with paper towels. Chop eggplant into cubes.
Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook pappardelle at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 10 to 11 minutes; drain.

Heat 1 1/2 tablespoon olive oil in a skillet over medium heat; cook and stir eggplant, adding more oil if eggplant gets dry, until browned, 5 to 10 minutes. Transfer eggplant to a bowl, reserving oil in the skillet.
Heat remaining oil in the same skillet; cook and stir onion and garlic until golden, about 10 minutes. Return eggplant to skillet and season with oregano; cook and stir for 1 minute more.

Mix tomatoes, vinegar, salt, sugar, and black pepper into eggplant mixture; cover skillet and simmer sauce until eggplant is softened, about 10 minutes. Mix sauce with pasta in a bowl; top with mozzarella cheese and basil.

memphis-style-ribs.name: Memphis-style Ribs
instructions: Stir peppercorns, mustard seeds, and cumin seeds in a small skillet over medium heat until toasted, about 2 minutes. Let cool. Put into a spice grinder with next 6 ingredients and pulse until finely ground. DO AHEAD Store in an airtight container for up to 3 months.

Sprinkle half the dry rub onto ribs and massage rub into the meat. Transfer ribs to a rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet and refrigerate uncovered for at least 6 hours or overnight. Build a medium fire in one side of a charcoal grill and arrange a drip pan opposite the coals. (Alternatively, heat a gas grill to medium.) Whisk together vinegar, mustard, and brown sugar in a small bowl; set mop sauce aside. Add wood chips to coals or smokebox and brush grill grate with oil. Put ribs on grill so they sit over the drip pan; cover and cook over indirect heat, replenishing charcoal as needed and brushing with mop sauce occasionally, until ribs are tender and pulling away from the bone, about 2 hours. Transfer ribs to a baking sheet, sprinkle with remaining dry rub, and let rest for 15 minutes before serving.

mexican-corn-salad.name: Mexican Corn Salad

ingredients.item: Chopped fresh cilantro plus more for serving

instructions: Prepare grill for medium heat. Grill corn, turning occasionally, until tender and charred, 8–10 minutes; let cool slightly. Cut kernels from cobs and transfer to a medium bowl.

Whisk mayonnaise, lime juice, paprika, cayenne, if using, 2 oz. Cotija cheese, and 2 tablespoons cilantro in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add corn and toss to combine. Top with more cheese and cilantro.
DO AHEAD: Dressing can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill. Corn can be grilled and cut from cobs 1 hour ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

mexican-style-burrito-lezzet.name: Mexican Style Burrito
instructions: 1. Take the dough into a wide mixing container of water, eggs and vinegar.
2. With the help of a mixer fry, salt and butter you eat.
3. All material is thoroughly paidwetir until we're wrong.
4. Take your dough lightly from the ear nozzle consistency to the countertop & dust.
5. 4-5 minutes more yoğurup Stretch Wrap Film.

7. Drink tribute interior hang the onion you eat in the olive oil until pink.
8. Add to restriction and continue to hang the color up to return.
9. Add salça,red paprika pepper and smear.
10. Taste salt and pepper, and bake the water of the mint and bake until the water of the mint.
11. 11. Take the rested dough into the bees.
12. Fine rounds with the help of a roller hungry
12. August Half of the dough, the minted mortar from the article close in the form of half a month.
14 July Bö indexes to oil paper series oven tray.
15. Go to the egg road and water in a bowl china and böreklesser.
16. Öpreheated from 180 degrees in the oven to 25-30 minutes until they are fried.
17. September Take the oven and serve hot or warm.

middle-eastern-rice-pilaf-with-pomegrana.name: Middle Eastern Rice Pilaf With Pomegranate

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat oil in a saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes. Add rice and toast until fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in hot vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Add saffron and allspice; reduce the heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid has been absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toast pistachios in a skillet over medium heat until nuts start to turn golden brown and become fragrant, 5 to 10 minutes. Set aside.
Stir butter into cooked rice. Remove from the heat and mix in pistachios and pomegranate seeds. Fluff with a fork and season with salt and pepper.

minced-meat-vegetables-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Vegetables
instructions: 1. Peel eggplants.
2. Let's wait for 30 minutes in salty and lemony water in the form of a ring.
3. slice after digging the outer shell of the grapes.
4. Peel the peel of potatoes and slice it in the ring form.
5. Wait for water to not be decided.
6. Lighten the latest zucchini of eggplants after potatoes before taking the sunflower oil into the pan.
7. After eating onions on the other side, sauce with butter.
8. Add and roast.
9. Add peppers and garlic that you eat on it and roast for 3-4 minutes.
10. Add the shake you watered and cook for 5 minutes.
11. 11. Add salt and pepper and get from the stove.
12. Transfer potatoes and some mint mortar in order to the oven container.

12. August Then after the pumpkin again, then the eggplant and the last again after adding the mink, place the tomatoes you cut in the form of half a month, and cook 25 minutes in the oven, which is set to 200 degrees you previously heated.
14 July Spread the grated cheese on the near to get from the oven and again sprinkle the oven.
15. Take the cheese from the oven after rubbish.
16. Serve hot.

mini-baked-alaskas.name: Mini Baked Alaskas

ingredients.item: Unsalted butter or nonstick vegetable oil spray
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
A 3"-diameter round cookie cutter (not fluted); a kitchen torch

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Butter a rimmed 18x13" baking sheet or lightly coat with nonstick spray. Line with parchment paper; lightly butter or coat parchment and dust lightly with flour, tapping out excess. Whisk together eggs, egg yolk, buttermilk, coffee, oil, and vanilla extract in a medium bowl.

Mix granulated sugar, cocoa powder, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and 1¾ cups (219 g) flour in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with paddle attachment on low speed until combined, about 1 minute. Add egg mixture in 3 additions, beating on medium speed 30 seconds after each addition. Add melted chocolate and beat, scraping down sides of bowl to ensure everything is well mixed.

Scrape batter into prepared baking sheet and rap on counter to level. Bake cake until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 20–25 minutes. Let cake cool 15 minutes, then run an offset spatula along edges to loosen. Set a wire rack upside down over baking sheet and flip over to release cake. Carefully peel away parchment paper and let cool completely.

Transfer cake to a cutting board. Cut out 12 rounds with cookie cutter (leftover scraps are for snacking). Top 6 cake rounds with a 1 Tbsp. dollop of jam each; sandwich with remaining cake rounds. Place each cake sandwich on an 8" square of plastic wrap (lightly moistening the counter will help plastic stay flat).

Soften ice cream just enough to be able to scoop with a #8 ice cream scoop (or a heaping ½ cup). Arrange a scoop of ice cream, flat side down, on top of each cake sandwich. Pull plastic wrap up and around cake and ice cream and twist to seal tightly. Freeze until ice cream is very hard, at least 1 hour.

Just before serving, heat egg whites, granulated sugar, and cream of tartar in the bowl of a stand mixer set over a saucepan of barely simmering water (do not let bowl touch water), whisking constantly, until sugar is dissolved and an instant-read thermometer registers 120°, 5–7 minutes.
Fit bowl onto stand mixer fitted with whisk attachment, add vanilla extract, and beat on medium-high speed until meringue forms stiff, glossy peaks, about 5 minutes.

Unwrap ice cream domes and place on individual heatproof plates. Working quickly, spread meringue over domes with a spoon or small offset spatula, making lots of decorative swirls and peaks all over. (You can also use a pastry bag fitted with a large fluted tip and pipe meringue over each dome.) Make sure all of the ice cream and cake is covered. Toast meringue with kitchen torch until golden.
Do Ahead: Ice cream domes can be assembled 3 days ahead. Keep frozen. Cover with meringue and toast just before serving.

mini-meatloaf-ghosts.name: Mini Meatloaf Ghosts
instructions: Combine ground beef, salt, pepper, cayenne, green onions, parsley, bread crumbs, egg, and Worcestershire sauce in a large bowl. Mix with a fork until just combined; do not overmix. Wrap and chill in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a sheet pan with a silicone liner (such as Silpat®).

Remove meat from the refrigerator and divide into 8 equal portions. Dampen your fingers with cold water and roll meat into smooth balls. Form each ball into a ghost (or pear) shape and place on the prepared sheet pan; try to center the heads over the bodies.
Bake in the center of the preheated oven until cooked through, about 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 66°C (66 degrees C).

Remove from the oven and immediately place a slice of provolone cheese on the top of each ghost, centering it the best you can. Cut the remaining 2 slices of provolone into quarters and place those over the center to provide more cheese for the head. The residual heat from the meat will start to melt the cheese and it will droop down.
Return to the oven until the cheese melts, 30 to 60 seconds.

Remove from the oven and take some of the melted cheese around the bottoms and wrap and drape it back up over the heads. Use the tip of a knife to form eyes and mouths, then neaten up the bottom of the cheese 'sheets.'
Combine ketchup, barbecue sauce, and Sriracha for blood sauce; ladle onto plates and serve meatloaf ghosts on top.

minty-pea-mash.name: Minty Pea Mash

ingredients.item: Toasted bread and assorted cruditès (such as fennel wedges
ingredients.prep: carrots, asparagus, radishes, and cooked baby potatoes)

instructions: Pulse garlic, peas, Pecorino, and mint in a food processor until finely chopped. Add oil and lemon juice and process until a coarse purée forms. Season with salt.
Serve pea mash with bread and cruditès.
DO AHEAD: Pea mash can be made 6 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

miso-soup.name: Miso Soup
instructions: Combine kombu and 4 cups water in a medium saucepan. Let sit until kombu softens, 25–30 minutes. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Immediately remove from heat once water starts simmering; fish out kombu and discard. Add bonito flakes and stir once to submerge them. Bring to a gentle boil, reduce heat, and simmer about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let steep 15 minutes (this ensures you get the most flavorful broth, or dashi, possible).
Meanwhile, combine wakame and 3 Tbsp. water in a small bowl; let sit until wakame is softened; 10–15 minutes.

Strain dashi (your broth) through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl. Discard solids, wipe out pot, and return dashi to pot. Add tofu and wakame and bring to a simmer. Remove from heat. Submerge sieve in liquid, add miso to sieve, and stir to liquefy miso (see how to do this here), then press through strainer until miso is dissolved.
Divide soup among bowls. Top with scallions.

miso-white-chocolate-macadamia-cookies.name: Miso White Chocolate-macadamia Cookies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 1¼ cups (156 g) all-purpose flour and ½ tsp. baking soda in a small bowl to combine; set aside.

Toast ¾ cup macadamia nuts in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, stirring often, until golden, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a cutting board; let cool. Very coarsely chop (you want to keep the pieces large).

Heat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in same skillet, swirling and scraping bottom of pan often with a heatproof rubber spatula, until it foams, then browns, about 4 minutes. Scrape into a large heatproof bowl; let cool 1 minute.

Add ½ cup (100 g) dark brown sugar, ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar, 2 Tbsp. white miso, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt to brown butter and whisk, breaking up any clumps, until sugars are dissolved. Whisk in 1 large egg, room temperature, and 1 tsp. vanilla extract. Working in 2 or 3 batches, sift reserved dry ingredients into bowl, folding after each addition until no dry spots remain. Add nuts, ½ cup semisweet or bittersweet chocolate chips, and ½ cup white chocolate chips and fold until just combined. Cover and chill dough at least 30 minutes and up to 1 day.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat oven to 350°. Using a #20 cookie scoop (or about 3 Tbsp.), portion out dough, placing 5–6 cookies each on 2 parchment-lined rimmed baking sheets, spacing about 2" apart, and sprinkle with flaky sea salt.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets front to back and top to bottom halfway through, until golden around edges, 14–16 minutes. Remove from oven and, using a spatula, lightly press down on cookies. Let cookies cool on baking sheets 5–10 minutes, then transfer to wire racks and let cool completely.

miso-tofu-ranch-dip.name: Miso-tofu Ranch Dip

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Purée tofu, miso, lemon juice, vinegar, garlic powder, onion powder, and pepper in a blender. Transfer to a medium bowl; mix in sour cream, parsley, and 2 Tbsp. chives. Top dip with more chives and serve with raw vegetables for dipping.
DO AHEAD: Dip can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

mixed-berry-sauce.name: Mixed Berry Sauce
instructions: Combine berries, sugar, and lemon juice in a small saucepan set over medium heat and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Pour water and orange juice into the mixture and simmer over low heat, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Raise the temperature to high heat and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 5 minutes more.

mosaic-cake-argiro.name: Mosaic Cake
instructions: Place the butter in a wide pot and on low heat.
Add the cocoa and mix with a spoon to join.
Add the sugary milk.
We mix very well.
We withdraw from the fire.
Add the cognac.
Break the cookies into small pieces (no powder), add them to the mixture.
Mix to cover the biscuits from the mixture and allow it to cool.
We put it in ring form, pressing so that there are no gaps.
Freeze for 30 minutes.

mozzarella-christmas-tree-teleculinaria.name: Mozzarella Christmas Tree

ingredients.item: 3 embalagens  embalagens de massa para pizza estendida
1 spoon (soup) basil leaves in thin and whole slices

instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 degrees. Line a large board with vegetable paper and book. Cut the mozzarella cheese into pieces of 1 cm and book also.
On a floury surface, unroll the pizza doughs, reject the accompanying vegetable paper and cut into squares of 5 cm each (you should get about 25 squares).

Wrap a square of dough around each piece of cheese, forming a tightly closed ball. Lay the balls on the board, together and with the union facing down, forming a Christmas tree as you see in the photo. Put it in the oven for about 15 to 20 minutes.

However, mix melted butter with grated parmesan, sliced basil, parsley and rosemary. After removing the tree from the oven, brush the balls with the previous mixture. Decorate with the cherry tomatoes, cut in half, and the basil leaves whole and serve.

muffin-flower-pastry-lezzet.name: Muffin Flower Pastry
instructions: 1. To prepare the dough, put all the ingredients in a deep kneading container, except for flour and yeast.
2. Mix the resulting mixture well by adding 1 cup flour and instant yeast.
3. Get a dough in the consistency of the ear nozzle, which does not add and address the azar.
4. Continue to knead the dough for 5 minutes.
5. Then leave the dough over 1 hour to swim.
6. Blend cheese and fine chopped parsley in a bowl to prepare the inner mortar while eating dough.
7. Take a piece of orange size from the yeast dough and beige.
8. Open 1 cm thick with the help of roller on the uncoated countertop.
9. Cut down apartments with the help of the dough, the mouth of the cup or a round mold.
10. Get 4 out of cut circles and index ends in a row.
11. 11. Wrap in the form of rolls by putting the cheese from the inner mortar.
12. Place the roll in muffin mold so that it will be planted.
12. August With other rounds, the remaining dough is through the same process and shape and sit on muffin molds.
14 July Mix the egg yolk and yoghurt in a bowl to ride on the heels.
15. With the help of the resulting egg mixture brush, go on the porots.
16. The dough, which is shaped, relax in the muffin mold for 30-45 minutes.
17. September Then in the oven of 180 degrees preheated in advance, cook until they fry.
18. Serve the pibbles from the oven, hot.
19. September If you wish, you can also look at the very popular flower pogae recipe.

muffin-meatballs-lezzet.name: Muffin Meatballs
instructions: 1. Take a stirring bowl.
2. Add onions and populated snowflower flowers that you eat.
3. Taste salt and pepper.
4. In addition to the mine you are thin, and all the material is thoroughly kneaded.
5. Prepare parts and meatballs in mortar walnut size.
6. Cut the ruby dough into two and place muffin molds.
7. Remove tomato porridge until a dessert spoon to their midges.
8. Reindeed mozarella cheese and place a meatballs.
9. Repeated tomato porridge and sprinkled mozarella cheese.
10. Preheated 180 degree bake until she gets angry on the oven.
11. 11. Serve hot.

mulling-spices-for-cider.name: Mulling Spices For Cider
instructions: Combine cinnamon sticks, cloves, allspice, and nutmeg in an airtight container.
Add lemon zest when making mulled cider.

mushroom-and-fontina-quiche.name: Mushroom And Fontina Quiche

ingredients.prep: stemmed shiitake, oyster, crimini, and button; 12 to 14 ounces), large mushrooms halved

instructions: Preheat oven to 232°C. Unroll crust completely. Press firmly onto bottom and up sides of 9-inch-diameter deep-dish glass pie dish. Bake until light golden brown, pressing on sides of crust with back of spoon if crust begins to slide down sides of dish, about 17 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 163°C.

Meanwhile, melt butter in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add shallots; sauté until beginning to soften, about 2 minutes. Add mushrooms; sprinkle with salt and pepper and sauté until mushrooms are tender and beginning to brown, about 8 minutes. Transfer to plate; spread out to cool slightly.

Whisk eggs, half and half, milk, 1/2 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and nutmeg in large bowl to blend. Stir in 1 cup Fontina cheese and sautéed mushrooms. Pour filling into crust. Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup cheese over quiche.
Bake quiche until puffed, golden brown, and just set in center, about 45 minutes. Cool 30 minutes. Cut into wedges.

mushroom-and-spinach-wrap-recipe-comeder.name: Mushroom And Spinach Wrap Recipe
mushroom-and-spinach-wrap-recipe-comeder.original_name: Receta de wrap de champiñones y espinacas
instructions: Wash and cut the mushrooms into slices.
Wash the spinach and let them slip.
Pica finamente la cebolla y el ajo.
In a large frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and spray till onion's clear.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they are tender and have released their juice, about 5-7 minutes.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Add spinach to frying pan with mushrooms.
Cocina hasta que las espinacas se hayan marchitado, unos 2-3 minutos.
Remueve todo para que los ingredientes se mezclen bien.
Heat tortillas into a frying pan or microwave to make them flexible.
It puts a portion of the mushroom and spinach mixture at the centre of each omelette.
If you wish, add crumpled Feta cheese above.
Dobla los lados de la tortilla hacia el centro y luego enrolla para formar el wrap.
Mix Greek yogurt with lemon juice and a pint of salt for a light sauce.
Serve the salsa apart or add it directly to the wrap before rolling.

mushroom-and-wheat-berry-pilaf-with-yogu.name: Mushroom And Wheat Berry Pilaf With Yogurt
instructions: Combine porcini mushrooms and 1 1/2 cups very hot tap water in a medium bowl; let stand 15 minutes to soften. Drain, reserving soaking liquid, and coarsely chop. Let solids in soaking liquid settle, then pour off 1 cup; set aside. Discards remaining liquid.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat. Add shallot and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened, about 3 minutes. Add porcini mushrooms and cook, stirring, until mushrooms are coated and fragrant, about 1 minute; season with salt and pepper.

Stir in wheat berries, reserved mushroom soaking liquid, and 2 cups water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer until wheat berries are al dente, 45–60 minutes. Uncover, increase heat to medium-high, and cook until liquid is almost completely evaporated, 15–20 minutes longer. Fluff wheat berries with a fork and transfer to a large bowl.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add one-third of mushrooms and 1 tsp. thyme and cook, tossing occasionally, until mushrooms are golden brown and tender, about 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper and transfer to bowl with wheat berries. Repeat 2 times with remaining oil, mushrooms, and thyme. Stir vinegar into wheat berry mixture; season with salt and pepper.
Serve wheat berry pilaf topped with yogurt, drizzled with more oil, and sprinkled with chives.

mushroom-beef-burgers.name: Mushroom Beef Burgers
instructions: Remove ground beef from the refrigerator; let stand at room temperature for 20 minutes.
Mix mushrooms, onion, garlic, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl. Mix in beef. Form beef mixture into 1/2-inch-thick patties.
Grease an indoor grill pan with cooking spray. Cook patties in batches until browned and no longer pink in the center, about 10 minutes per side.

mushroom-chestnut-soup-lezzet.name: Mushroom Chestnut Soup

ingredients.item: 3~4 cups chicken water or vegetable watery  u

instructions: 1. Peel chestnuts and peel their shells.
2. Heat butter in the pot.
3. Add and paste the onion you eat.
4. Add the potato and kere stem that you eat in the form of a cubicle and soak for 4-5 minutes.
5. Add chestnuts and 3 cups of water and leave boiling in medium fire.
6. Crush vegetables to smooth consistency when it comes to hand blender.
7. Take the pot again.
8. Add water to the soup if the water does not have enough.
9. Heat the sunflower oil in the pan.
10. Add your sliced mushroom and half a tablespoon of lemon juice and so on.
11. 11. Add to chestnut soup.
12. Add salt and pepper and boil 1-2 minutes and get from the stove.
12. August Transfer the soup to bowls hotly and add peppers with slices of mushrooms on it.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
15. You can also try the simple version of the chestnut soup.

must-argiro.name: Must
instructions: The must is made with grapes from various varieties. To make it we choose grapes from the variety we prefer, ripe with strong nipples.

The amount of must you will extract depends on the quantity of grapes and their variety. Indicatively, if you use 1 kilo of grapes, you will get about 600 grams of must. If you are going to make petimese from the must, then calculate that every 500 grams of must remain about 100 grams of petimisi. That is why we use a similar amount of grapes.
If you have a juicer use it to get the grape juice. Otherwise, fasten a sign deep. That's a very thin slide with a fine wire screen on a pot.
Throw in a few clean grapes. With a pestle or with your hands, press and squeeze the grapes' nipples to get their juice.
Flours, stems and pits are not needed, so don’t put the grilles in the blender to grind them.
After removing all the grape juice, the must is ready.
Squeeze the juice into a folded tulpan attached to a colander and now you are ready to proceed to the next step and make petimese or cut the beard according to my instructions.
With the cut must you can make wonderful traditional mustard. and unique traditional mustard.

15-minute-garlic-bread-pizza.name: 15-minute Garlic Bread Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C).
Arrange the frozen garlic toast on a baking sheet.
Make the pepperoni garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the pizza sauce, mozzarella, and pepperoni.
Make the veggie lovers garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the pizza sauce, mozzarella, bell pepper, zucchini, mushrooms, and olives.
Make the bacon jalapeño garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the ranch, mozzarella, crumbled bacon, and pickled jalapeño slices.
Make the margherita garlic bread pizza: Top 2 slices of garlic toast with the tomato slices and mozzarella.
Bake for 8–12 minutes, until the bread is crispy and warmed through and the cheese is melted. Garnish the margherita garlic bread pizzas with the basil.
Enjoy!
